headlines.headline: Zelvix Therapeutics reports record quarterly revenue, up 15% year-over-year

sentiment.reasoning: Record revenue growth of 15% year-over-year indicates strong operational performance and market demand.

sentiment.reasoning: Rising costs directly impacting margins is a negative signal for profitability and operational efficiency.

sentiment.reasoning: A class action lawsuit regarding service disruption poses both financial liability and reputational risk.

headlines.headline: Frelis Genomics sees 8% drop in new customer orders this quarter

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
